134 P1AB P1AB_DIALYSIS 38ab(P1ab)Special Care - Dialysis CHAR 1 Indicates the patient recevied dialysis. Includes peritoneal and renal dialysis. 0 = Unchecked, 1 = Checked, -1 = Unknown
